race.comment: ADMIRE TIFF (11) moved well in her recent trial over this distance at Lark Hill under Fiore and looks ready to fire on debut. She sat close to the speed there but got the job done without much urgency. Blinkers go on despite not having them in her trial and she can fire right away. MY TESTIMONY (9) hasn't been far away in recent efforts, coming back to this grade last time out and fading late. Tsang will look to roll across from out wide once again and the fact she settles up front is a big tick. Carries no weight again and she'll be in this for a long way. SASSYASSA (8) has been off the scene for a long time but will be fitter for two trials coming into this. Pike was on board for her latest outing and remains in the saddle for her return today. Creates plenty of interest. HURRICANE RULER (4) moved well in his most recent trial as he came off the speed to score. Can be in the finish. ACTION NOT TALK (3) can improve on the debut run where he jumped fav here a fortnight ago.
